# Chemical Promoters

**Summary**: Chemical substances added to accelerate hydrate formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024]] evaluated chemical promoters like SDS and GS-12 to reduce induction times and improve storage capacity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- GS-12 and SDS outperformed thermodynamic agents like THF in accelerating hydration kinetics. ([[2024-habiburrahman|HABIBURRAHMAN, 2024, p. 24]])
